feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Account Assignment Category Q not available PR item level flexible workflow
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

Account Assignment Category Q not available PR item level flexible workflow. Please check enclosed and let us know why Q is missing ? Provide details on how to get this category ?

entry.title: Is it possible to disable document splitting in 2602
entry.content:
Dear all,

In 2602, document splitting is activated default, but I don't document splitting on profit center wise. Is it possible to disable document splitting in 2602? is there any Note or official document mention this?Thanks

B,R

entry.title: [S/4HANA Cloud] Regarding the use of BOM in order-based design-to-order production (ETO)
entry.content:
Final Products: Produced based on make-to-order production.

Semi-finished Products: Produced on a make-to-stock basis. WBS elements are linked and managed using WBS inventory and cost.

We want to incorporate the dependent requirements from the final product into the WBS element requirements, so the final product policy group is set to E2 (Made-to-Order Design Production).

However, we've found that the BOM (Bill of Materials) is not used with E2.

Is there a way to use the BOM with the E2 policy group, or an alternative that satisfies the above requirements?

entry.title: Serial Number modification - Production Order - S/4HANA Public Cloud 2602
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are working on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2602 and we have a requirement related to serial number management in manufacturing.

Business context:
When releasing a Production Order, we need to create serial numbers according to specific business rules.

Expected behavior:
At the Production Order release step, serial numbers should be automatically generated based on predefined rules.

Current issue:
We are not able to generate the serial numbers according to these business rules at the time of Production Order release.

We are looking for guidance on the standard capabilities and possible extensibility options available in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Thank you in advance for your help.

entry.title: Bank statement processing - No technical account required
entry.content:
Hi ,

While uploading bank statement the entries are posted using technical  GL account. We do not want this GL to be impacted. In app Manage Processing Rules - For Bank Statements I checked the Automate or Automate Rule button is missing from your screen in the Manage Processing Rules app. While activating the functionality I checked the scope ID 1MV but it is not activated .  Kindly let us know the workaround.

entry.title: Special G/L Indicators - Need provision to create new and rename the existing descriptions
entry.content:
In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, the Special G/L Indicators available for Customer and Supplier transactions are currently delivered as part of the SAP standard configuration.

While working on multiple implementations for Indian customers, a few practical challenges are consistently observed from FI business users and finance teams:

  • The system currently does not allow creation of additional (new) Special G/L Indicators for client-specific business requirements.

  • Renaming or maintaining user-friendly descriptions for existing Special G/L Indicators is also not permitted in the Public Cloud edition.

  • Due to this limitation, FI users often face difficulty correlating the Special G/L Indicators with the relevant accounting purpose or linked G/L accounts during transaction processing, reconciliation, and reporting activities.

  • This becomes more challenging in Indian business scenarios where organizations may require additional classifications for advances, retention amounts, security deposits, statutory adjustments, or industry-specific accounting processes.

As a result, finance users need to rely heavily on internal mapping documents and user training, which increases operational dependency and the possibility of accounting errors.

Hence, similar to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, there should be a provision in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition to:

  1. Rename or maintain business-friendly descriptions for existing Special G/L Indicators.

  2. Create additional Special G/L Indicators based on business requirements, with appropriate configuration governance.

Such flexibility would significantly improve usability for FI users, reduce operational complexity, and support localization and industry-specific accounting practices more effectively.

entry.title: API: Read and Modify WBS element Status
entry.content: Our client (S4HANA Public Cloud) is requesting a custom development to read and modify WBS element status, (such as  BAPI_BUS2054_GET_STATUS).  Are there any standard APIs or Business Objects available to fulfill this requirement?

entry.title: RKANBU01 - Public Cloud
entry.content: Is there an application or equivalent job available in the S4HANA Public Cloud system similar to the RKANBU01 program?

entry.title: Automatic payment block required for employee invoices when higher-value credit notes exist
entry.content:
We have a business requirement from our Germany team related to the processing of employee expense invoices and credit notes in SAP.

Currently, employee credit notes are often posted with a significantly higher value than the corresponding employee expense invoices. However, the employee expense invoices are posted with immediate payment terms and comparatively lower invoice amounts.

As a result, during the payment run:

  • The employee expense invoices are picked up and paid immediately.
  • The higher-value employee credit notes remain open and move to the exception queue due to insufficient offsetting/open item balancing.

This creates operational and reconciliation challenges, as the related invoice and credit note are not processed together.

Current Challenge

The expected b

entry.title: Planned Replenishment to fill in terms of pallet. not in loose pieces
entry.content: Planned Replenishment Storage type to fill in terms of pallet. not in loose pieces since replenished Storage Type expects full pallets filling since users will not be allowed to pack before replenishment process.

entry.title: Object RM07MIGO_PO_HISTORY of class RE does not exist in language EN. - S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi all,

When clicking on the "Purchase Order History" button in the "Purchase Order History" tab within the STO goods receipt document, an error message is displayed instead of opening the order history information.

Error Message:

Object RM07MIGO_PO_HISTORY of class RE does not exist in language EN.

Message no. SD140

S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Modification of the YCOA Operational Chart of Account
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

We have adapted the YCOA operational chart of account and have used the YCES as an alternative chart of account. We are aware that changes to the account plan must be made from the customizing system and then transported to the test system and then to the production system.

Our client would like to know when the possibility for functional users to modify the accounting accounts directly in production would be available, without having to do so from the customizing system.

We want to know if this will be possible in future versions?

Thank you in advance.

Greetings

entry.title: Blocking Modification of purchase info record
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team

We need to modify the prices in the app Change Purshasing Info Record.

In the Condition section, we need to modify the price without creating another condition period.

The price field is locked, it does not allow you to change the field to modify the price.

We don't want to add another period, we need to directly modify the price.

Please tell us in which app the price can be changed both individually and in massive.

Thank you in advance.

Greetings

entry.title: Report for Sales Order Value vs Billing Amount (Open Sales Value) in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have a business requirement to create a report showing Billing Amount vs Sales Order Value. The goal is to identify the open (unbilled) sales value at sales order level.

Note: We are using order-related billing and do not create deliveries.

We have already checked standard apps such as:

  • Manage Sales Orders
  • Sales Volume
  • Flexible Analysis

However, we could not find any fields related to billing amount in these apps.

Is there any standard Fiori app or report available to fulfill this requirement in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, or is a custom solution required?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Disable Scanning Functionality in Confirm Production Order / Confirm Operation Apps
entry.content:
We are using SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (release 2602) in a manufacturing environment (Timberlab CLT production).

Within the Fiori apps:

  • Confirm Production Operation
  • Confirm Production Order

the system is triggering or requiring scan functionality as part of the confirmation process.

We would like to disable or suppress scanning behavior specifically within these apps, while keeping the rest of the production process intact.

As we will be using an external to trigger this action.

entry.title: Automatic FIFO Batch Determination During Sales Order Creation in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to know if the system can automatically determine and assign the batch based on FIFO (First In, First Out) when creating a sales order, so users do not need to manually select the batch.

Thanks and regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Purchase Requisition generated for non-finalized Sales Order
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are working w S/4HANA Public Cloud and I'd like to ask your support, thoughts.

When a Sales Order is created for a Purchased Components (e.g. Trading Goods) and it is saved but not yet finalized, SAP generates Purchase Requisitions immediately. PRs are then accessable for Purchasing Team to convert them to Purchase Orders, while Sales Order content can still change. We work with automatic PR approval workflow for system generated PRs (MRP/SO) and would like to stick to that concept.

How to trigger PR creation only when a Sales Order is finalized (e.g. document sent status at Sales Order Header level)?

Thank you for your support, Krisztina

entry.title: How do Customizing Tenant and Development Tenant work together in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently preparing for my Sourcing and Procurement  certification and studying the system landscape in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. I have a question regarding the two workspaces in SAP Central Business Configuration (CBC) and how they relate to the overall landscape.

In CBC, when selecting the Deployment Target, I can see two available targets:
- SAP S/4HANA Cloud 3-System Landscape — Training Customizing (Entitlement Role: Training Customizing)
- SAP S/4HANA Cloud 3-System Landscape — Training Development (Entitlement Role: Training Development)

 

From what I understand:
- One CBC workspace is connected to the Customizing Tenant
- A second CBC workspace is connected to the Development Tenant
- Both are part of the SAP S/4HANA Cloud development system

My background: I have worked on SAP Private Cloud / On-Premise projects where we had a classic 4-system landscape (D, Q, R, P) with customizing and development handled together in the D system and transported in one direction through the landscape.

My questions are:

1. Do the Customizing Tenant and Development Tenant each have their own independent transport landscape (e.g. each with their own Q, R and P systems)? Or do they share the same downstream systems?

2. How do developments or extensions built in the Development Tenant eventually reach the production environment? Is there a transport mechanism between the two tenants at any point?

3. Where do business users perform UAT — only in the Customizing Tenant, or also in the Development Tenant? If both tenants need to be tested, does this mean UAT must be conducted twice?

Thank you very much for any clarification!

Best regards

entry.title: Difference of advanced foreign currency valuation and classical foreign currency valuation
entry.content:
Hello,

when configuring the classical foreign currency valuation, it is possible to maintain to different exchange rate types (one for debit and one for credit).

Is this possible in the advanced foreign currency valuation as well? We would need this for our customer.

Kind regards

Fabian

entry.title: Cannot see YCOA Change Log in SAP Prod
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team, 

Please share the documentation how we can track the change log for YCOA changes done and transported in SAP Prod. 

We want to see the old and new value - Currently no change history is recorded in the FIOR app " Manage G/L Account Master Data"
